from celery import shared_task
from flask import request


@shared_task
def process_order_background(order_data: dict):
    user_id = order_data["user_id"]
    request_id = order_data.get("request_id")

    if request_id:
        request_context = get_request_context(request_id)
        user_timezone = request_context.get("timezone", "UTC")
        user_locale = request_context.get("locale", "en")
    else:
        user_timezone = "UTC"
        user_locale = "en"

    order = create_order(order_data, timezone=user_timezone, locale=user_locale)
    send_confirmation_email(order)
    return order.id


@shared_task
def generate_report_for_user(request_data: dict):
    current_user = request_data.get("current_user")
    if current_user:
        permissions = current_user.get("permissions", [])
    else:
        permissions = []

    report = build_report(request_data["filters"], permissions)
    return report.id
